titleStmt.title: The Student's Dictionary of Anglo-Saxon - TEI Lex-0 electronic edition
SWT2TEI

respStmt.resp: Digital transcription of the print source by
respStmt.name: Mike Pope

availability.licence: Copyright © 2026 Sergei Stoliarov. All rights reserved. No reuse, modification, or redistribution is permitted without prior written permission from the copyright holder.

biblStruct.note: Encoding based on the HTML transcription prepared by Mike Pope: https://mikepope.com/sweet/sweet-dictionary-entries.html

cit.quote: with the stolen goods in his possession
gif hē þæs andgytes hæfþ þæt hē hit understandan mæg
þā lǣwedan willaþ ~ þone mōnan be þām þe hī hine gesēoþ
þone calic þe ic tō drincenne hæbbe

gramGrp.gram: to form past tenses w. inflected or (gen.) uninflected ptc.

cit.quote: oþ þæt hīe hine ofslægen(ne) hæfdon
if he has the money, can afford it
nis ēac nān wundor, þēah ūs mislimpe
lenctentīma gǣþ tō ~e on vii. id. febr.
